games.prediction_basis: PD/G diff -33.38 (BRI dominant). Market BRI implied 96.2%, vig 89.2%. NEW home +3% - BRI away -3% net -6% -> BRI 83%. L1 dominance +5% -> BRI 88% (Q3 threshold).

score_detail.winning_tries_summary: BRI 9 tries (Lane 10', Ravouvou 12', Brocklebank 21', Jordan 25', Heward 42', Wade 51', van Rensburg 62', Hodge 66', Thacker 80'). NEW 2 tries (Moroni 45', Heward 42').

games.match_summary: BRI commanding 33-pt victory (52-19) at Kingston Park, NEW home ground [FETCH:https://www.sofascore.com/rugby/match/newcastle-falcons-bristol-bears/QIbsRIb]. HT 5-21 で前半から BRI 優位を確立 [FETCH:https://www.sofascore.com/rugby/match/newcastle-falcons-bristol-bears/QIbsRIb]. NEW (Red Bulls) 10位 1W-13L 7pt / BRI 5位 10W-4L 48pt (4/19 時点) [FETCH:https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2025%E2%80%9326_Premiership_Rugby]. 市場fav BRI (1.04) の Q3_output_a 高信頼予測が33点差大勝で正当化 [INFER]. confidence_drift 判定対象外 (33点差大勝 / ユニオン系 7点差以内薄勝ち閾値外) [INFER].
games.notes: NEW league-worst PD/G -27.38 (1 win). BRI 9-4 attacking momentum. P006 team sheet 48h + P007 weather to verify pre-match. Odds <=1.10 no practical bet but prediction confidence high.

games.prediction_basis: L1 reversal: SAL PD/G better (-7.31 vs HQ -14.69). Market HQ fav 61.7% vig. L1 SAL edge -5% HQ, HQ home +3% -> HQ 60%. EV -10%. Q4 upset_watch: UF2 but UF<3 no UPSET_PICK.
games.notes: Market anomaly candidate. HQ home field vs SAL road. SAL 3-10 but -7 PD/G vs HQ 3-10 -14 PD/G indicates SAL more competitive in defeats. P006/P007 verify pre-match.

games.prediction_basis: PD/G near-even (+11.54 vs +11.92). Market SAR 67.5% vig-adj. SAR home +3% -> 70%. EV -4.1%. Classic rivalry tight matchup.
games.notes: Top-half clash. Leicester ahead on wins (10-3 vs SAR 6-7). PD/G equal. SAR home edge only.

games.prediction_basis: L1 reversal mild: BAT PD/G better (+14.69 vs NSA +9.23). Market NSA heavy fav 81.4% vig. L1 BAT edge -3% NSA, NSA home +3% -> NSA 81%. EV -7.7%. Q4 upset_watch.

score_detail.winning_tries_summary: NSA 5 tries (Tommy Freeman hat-trick 15'/30'/73' + Ollie Sleightholme 2 tries). BAT 6 tries (Hennessey, Green, Carr-Smith, de Glanville, Griffin, Tuipulotu). 83min Fin Smith penalty (Enoch Opoku-Gyamfu の high tackle penalty) で決着.

games.date_correction_note: Original record date 2026-04-26 corrected to 2026-04-25 based on skysports.com match report (Saturday 25 April 2026 fixture confirmed) [FETCH:https://www.skysports.com/rugby-union/northampton-vs-bath/111292]. 訂正実施: A-3 サブタスク3 セッション2 (Session_64) 2026-04-28.
games.match_summary: NSA 41-38 BAT 3点差薄勝ち at Franklin's Gardens [FETCH:https://www.skysports.com/rugby-union/northampton-vs-bath/111292]. HT 26-14 で NSA 前半リードも、BAT が後半反撃 [FETCH:https://www.skysports.com/rugby-union/northampton-vs-bath/111292]. Tommy Freeman ハットトリック (15'/30'/73') + Ollie Sleightholme 2 tries で NSA 5 tries [FETCH:https://www.skysports.com/rugby-union/northampton-vs-bath/111292]. BAT 主力温存 (Champions Cup SF Bordeaux-Begles 翌週見据え) で本来のチーム力との差が拡大 [FETCH:https://www.skysports.com/rugby-union/northampton-vs-bath/111292]. 83min Fin Smith penalty (Enoch Opoku-Gyamfu の high tackle penalty で成立) で決着 [FETCH:https://www.skysports.com/rugby-union/northampton-vs-bath/111292]. 市場fav NSA (1.14) の Q4_upset_watch 予測が薄勝ちで実現 = HIT [INFER]. confidence_drift=high 必須付与 (conf 81% + 3点差 ユニオン系 7点差以内薄勝ち閾値内 / 議題3 規定) [MEMORY:CLAUDE.md 柱C 4-1 confidence_drift 種目別閾値テーブル]. NSA リーグ首位を確固化 [FETCH:https://www.skysports.com/rugby-union/northampton-vs-bath/111292].
games.notes: Title race R14. NSA 11-1-1 league leaders on points. BAT 11-2 with best PD/G. Critical for playoff positioning. P006/P007 team sheet weather essential.
